summary: Added SELF-MODEL content-hash binding. SELF-AUDIT now computes SHA-256 for CAP evidence files, reports content_hash match/mismatch/missing states, and CAP-0001 evidence file hashes were refreshed. Added scripts/refresh_capability_hashes.py and expanded self-model tests. Focused self-model tests passed with 10 tests and the full suite passed with 279 tests before commit.
